Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell athletics records
Cornell University
40-1-370
50.6 cubic feet. 50.6 cubic feet.
1874-2016. Athletic event programs, photographs, annual reports, advertisements, plaques, cups, films and clippings concerning various Cornell athletic events, including women's athletics, and a certificate of incorporation of the Cornell Athletic Association. Collection material in English Programs, photographs, advertisements, clippings, reports, and a certificate. <<<<<<< HEAD 2061 2062 2063 1709 1710 1711 23 ======= 2061 2062 2063 1709 1710 1711 23 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2828389
Conditions Governing Access
Folders for individual athletes and coaches may contain personally identifiable information or other sensative items and need to be reviewed before being made available.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Sports Programs and Team Booklets Boxes 1-4, 7, 9, 10
Series II. Reports and Handbooks Boxes 5, 6
Series III. Notes, Memos, and Brochures Box 6
Series IV. Articles and Clippings Boxes 5, 6, 8
Series V. Correspondence Box 6
Series VI. Budget Box 6
Series VII. Movie Films, Videos and other media Box 9
Series VIII. Plaques and cups Museum items (MU)
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Maria Keating, et al
Date completed:
May 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, May 2003 Maria Keating, May 2004
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
Cite As:
Cornell Athletics Records, #40-1-370. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
RELATED MATERIALS
Related collections: Football Miscellany, 37-5-3981; Crew Records, 40-1-924; Hockey Films and Ephemera Collection, 40-4-3590; Football motion pictures, 40-2-2205; Track And Field Collection, 40-9-1820.
Scope and content
Athletic event programs and booklets, photographs, annual reports, advertisements, plaques, cups, films and clippings concerning various Cornell athletic events including women's athletics, and a certificate of incorporation of the Cornell Athletic Association. Also Cornell Victorious, the Cornell Campaign for Athletics, ca. 1990, V-790; Design plans for the Bartels Hall (formerly Alberding Field House), V-6028; Illini Reflections, ca. 1990 overview of past University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign events and life as presented by past university alumni. Included are Judi Ford-Johnson '73, Roger Ebert '64, Roger Plummer '84, Lester Leutwiler '29, Tom Haller '58, Ray Nitschke '58, and Dick Butkus '64, V-6029. Films include: Here We Are Again, 2 copies, ca. 1985, film about the history of Cornell athletics, F-478, 479; Stanford Today, 1985, film about Stanford University and its athletic programs, F-480. Also a film of a Cornell Soccer game ca. 1958-1960, F-390. Also slides from the 1974 Cornell and Cornellians presentation by Laurence Koplik.
Restrictions on Use:
Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual media that has been digitized: F-390.
Processing Information
April 2022: All material relating to Ice Hockey was transferred to the Cornell University Ice Hockey collection, #40-4-3590. This includes box 44, as well as various folders in other boxes. See Finding Aid for more information.

Scope and Contents
Slide show made as part of a presentation by Laurence Koplik '72 and the Cornell Office of Public Information, visual Services and Radio-TV Film. Dedicated to Morris Bishop. Features many photos of various student activities on campus, but particularly athletic teams and coaches.Two photo albums showing renovation of Schoellkopf field, crescent bleachers, press box, Hoy field and Alumni fields.19889Binder of slides showing Athletic Facilities Study ca. 1983, shows maps of various Cornell athletics facilities and proposals for future expansion.19839Cornell Victorious, the Cornell Campaign for Athletics [VHS]V-79019909Design plans for the Bartels Hall (formerly Alberding Field House) [VHS]V-602819889Illini Reflections [VHS]V-602919909
